raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The request to make the passage stronger centrally implies improving the framing of the proposed framework, contribution, and significance above the sentence level.","R1.2":"The passage contains several causal and argumentative links that would need to be made more coherent for the section to feel stronger.","R1.3":"Claims about tracking error, robustness, computational overhead, and deployment require tighter alignment with the reported evaluation results.","R1.5":"The section-level flow from method to trigger mechanism to evaluation to limitations is relevant to strengthening the narrative arc.","R1.6":"The artifact has clear sentence-level problems in tense, run-ons, concision, and academic register, making writing polish load-bearing.","RX.1":"Any strengthening should preserve uncertainty around unproven stability, robustness, and deployment claims.","RX.2":"The delegation requires avoiding inflated claims beyond the evidence stated in the artifact.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within improving the research-writing passage rather than performing new experiments or literature review.","RX.4":"Because the text concerns controller deployment and stability, strengthened language should not obscure safety-relevant limitations.","RX.5":"The revised responsibility would need to keep traceability to the reported benchmark, baseline, assumptions, and cited prior experience."}}

rationale.R1.1: The request to make the passage stronger centrally implies improving the framing of the proposed framework, contribution, and significance above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.2: The passage contains several causal and argumentative links that would need to be made more coherent for the section to feel stronger.
rationale.R1.3: Claims about tracking error, robustness, computational overhead, and deployment require tighter alignment with the reported evaluation results.
rationale.R1.5: The section-level flow from method to trigger mechanism to evaluation to limitations is relevant to strengthening the narrative arc.
rationale.R1.6: The artifact has clear sentence-level problems in tense, run-ons, concision, and academic register, making writing polish load-bearing.
rationale.RX.1: Any strengthening should preserve uncertainty around unproven stability, robustness, and deployment claims.
rationale.RX.2: The delegation requires avoiding inflated claims beyond the evidence stated in the artifact.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within improving the research-writing passage rather than performing new experiments or literature review.
rationale.RX.4: Because the text concerns controller deployment and stability, strengthened language should not obscure safety-relevant limitations.
rationale.RX.5: The revised responsibility would need to keep traceability to the reported benchmark, baseline, assumptions, and cited prior experience.
